backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining types (Cattle, CustomerAccount, CattleOrder, etc.), state maps, and CRUD endpoints for cattle, customers, and orders with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (login selection, admin login, customer login, routing) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark mode theming including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Dairy Business App that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (login selection, admin/customer login, portal, dashboard, and admin sub-pages) wrapped in QueryClientProvider and CustomerAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminCattleManag: Admin UI component for managing cattle records with a table, add/edit dialog form, and delete confirmation dialog, using admin query hooks and backend Cattle/HealthStatus/CattleAvailability types.
frontend/src/components/AdminCustomerMan: Admin UI component for managing customer accounts with a table listing all customers and dialogs for adding, editing, deleting, and toggling active status.
frontend/src/components/AdminOrdersDeliv: Admin UI component that displays all cattle orders in a table and provides a dialog to update order status and delivery notes.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Reusable form component for creating or editing a cattle record, handling fields like tag number, breed, purchase date, milking capacity, price, availability, and health status.
frontend/src/components/CattleHealthChar: Renders a donut pie chart visualizing the distribution of cattle health statuses (Healthy, Sick, Recovered) using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDelivery: Displays a customer's cattle orders in a table with status badges, showing an empty state if no orders exist.
frontend/src/components/CustomerFeedback: Stub component that renders nothing, kept to prevent import errors from references to the now-obsolete feedback dialog.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Reusable form component for creating or editing a customer account, with fields for name, phone, address, username, password, and active status toggle.
frontend/src/components/CustomerMyDelive: Customer-facing component that shows the logged-in customer's orders and delivery statuses in a table with skeleton loading states and an empty state illustration.
frontend/src/components/CustomerPlaceOrd: React component that lets a customer browse available cattle and place an order by selecting a cattle tag and optional notes, using React Query for data fetching and mutation.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryQuantity: Stub component that replaces a removed delivery chart, rendering a placeholder message to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/FlaggedFeedbackS: Stub component that replaces a removed flagged feedback section, rendering nothing to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: Form component for adding a new inventory item or updating the quantity of an existing one, using local type definitions since inventory is not backed by the canister.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component providing a sticky header with responsive navigation links for all major sections, plus links to the Admin Panel and Customer Portal.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: Stub component that replaces a removed milk production chart, rendering a placeholder message to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionTr: Stub component that replaces a removed milk production trend chart, rendering a placeholder message to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Displays a static catalog of farm products (milk and dairy) grouped by category, with pricing, descriptions, and a 'Popular' badge for highlighted items.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a new user to enter their name on first login, saving the profile to the canister via a mutation and blocking dismissal until submitted.
frontend/src/components/ResolveFeedbackD: Stub component that replaces a removed resolve-feedback dialog, rendering nothing to prevent import errors.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: Stub component that replaces a removed WhatsApp message modal, accepting but ignoring its props and rendering nothing.
frontend/src/context/CustomerAuthContext: React context providing customer session state (login/logout) with sessionStorage persistence, exposing a hook for consuming authentication status and session data.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for admin CRUD operations on cattle, customers, and orders, wrapping actor calls with success/error toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Simple hook that wraps the Clipboard API to copy text, exposing copied state and error, with a configurable reset delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQueries.ts: Provides a mutation hook for customer login that calls the backend actor and maps LoginError variants to user-friendly error messages.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Re-exports all admin and customer query hooks and provides a shared useIsAdmin hook that checks if the current caller has admin privileges.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind CSS, imports Google Fonts, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system, and includes print styles.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for local TypeScript type definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that handles Internet Identity authentication, verifies admin status via the backend actor, and redirects to the admin panel or shows an access-denied message accordingly.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin panel page that verifies Internet Identity authentication and admin privileges, then renders tabbed management sections for cattle, customers, and orders/deliveries.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Standalone cattle management page displaying a stats overview, a data table of all cattle, and dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting cattle records.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLogin.tsx: Customer login page with a username/password form that authenticates via the backend, stores the session in context, and redirects to the customer portal on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Admin page for managing customer accounts with search/filter, stats cards, and dialogs for adding, editing, deleting, and toggling active status, plus CSV export.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerPortal.tsx: Customer-facing portal page that shows a tabbed interface for placing orders and viewing deliveries, guarding access by redirecting unauthenticated users to the login page.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying summary stats (cattle, customers, orders) with stat cards, a cattle health chart, and a recent orders table.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Delivery Reports page that wraps the AdminOrdersDeliveries component to track and manage cattle orders and deliveries.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Placeholder page for Inventory Management that displays a 'Feature Not Available' message indicating the feature has been removed.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelection.tsx: Landing page presenting two login options (Admin and Customer) with navigation cards routing to their respective login pages.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Placeholder page for Milk Production tracking that displays a 'Feature Not Available' message directing users to Cattle Management instead.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Monthly Reports page that groups orders by month and displays per-month summaries with delivered, pending, and cancelled counts alongside order details.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility functions for exporting customers, cattle, and orders data to CSV files, plus legacy stub functions for removed features.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Utility functions for formatting a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message and generating a wa.me URL with the encoded message for a given phone number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the AO Farms Portal frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Nunito, Merriweather), OKLCH-based color tokens (including farm palette, sidebar, admin/customer tokens), border radius, box shadows, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for AO Farms Portal (version 3), tracking existing features and a pending fix request to split the login page into separate Admin (Internet Identity) and Customer (username/password) entry points, restoring the working admin login from Version 28.
